chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-18 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General along with Ali Raza Ansari, Commissioner SMC, Naheed Ahmed Mirani ADC-1 Sukkur, Jail Kumar Chawla, G.M SSGC, Aijaz Ahmed Channa, CEO SEPCO, Depark Kumar, DG/HR Admn, SEPCO and Muhammad Sulleman Dahri, Asstt. Manager (Legal) SEPCO ************** In compliance with the order dated 29.09.2025, the respondents have filed their comments/statement, same are taken on record. From perusal of the record, it appears that the graveyard allegedly encroached upon belongs to the Parsi community, and the petitioner, being a Muslim, has no concern with the same. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has not been in contact with him for a considerable time; therefore, under instructions, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
